assertions.name: ls_arrived
assertions.detail: List the files in this workspace, one per line, no preamble. Thinking Run ls -1

assertions.name: readme_arrived

assertions.name: create_arrived
assertions.detail: Create a file called HELMOR_DEMO.md in this workspace containing the single line: Hello from the remote container Though

beats.caption: Workspace bound to docker-linux-arm64 — runtime chip in the header. The composer is the same one you'd use locally.
"list the files" → agent ran `ls -1` on the container; REMOTE_ONLY_MARKER.txt came back in the tool result.
"read README.md" → file read from /home/e2e/helmor-workspaces/helmor-taper, line quoted back.
"create HELMOR_DEMO.md" → file lives on the container's disk, not the laptop.

prompts.ls: List the files in this workspace, one per line, no preamble.
prompts.readme: Read README.md from this workspace and quote its second line verbatim. Respond with only that line, no preamble.
prompts.create: Create a file called HELMOR_DEMO.md in this workspace containing the single line: Hello from the remote container
